description: Local-only pilot proof scenarios used to seed realistic queue, review, source, render, and ops work against existing local workflow runs.

scenarios.label: Clean promoted-pack review
notes: Proof scenario: reviewer clears a promoted-pack clinical review and confirms the run can proceed.

scenarios.label: Provisional typed-disease promotion
notes: Proof scenario: reviewer checks a provisional typed-disease pack and decides whether it can be promoted.

scenarios.label: Stale source refresh
notes: Proof scenario: refresh a governed source before it blocks export.

scenarios.label: Render retry review
notes: Proof scenario: inspect a rendered panel retry queue item and verify guide/reference provenance.

scenarios.label: Local ops drill
notes: Proof scenario: verify restore-smoke, delivery mirror verification, and bundle integrity follow-through.
